card.subtitle: Longship
card.body: Home and transport for the crew. A reliable vessel with a complicated past (it used to be someone else's boat).

card.subtitle: A shitty little port
card.body: 50 people, a belltower and some cuttlefish.  If you're starving, it's better than nothing.
card.quote: "Lothing welcomes you! ...please help, they've got us locked in this stupid tower." — Tourism Board

card.subtitle: Dungeon
card.body: A dungeon full of dead people (and 1 poor undead fellow) seemingly imprisoned there as punishment. 4 brilliant trees feeding a giant worm and the corpse of a queen were the highlights
card.quote: carved in a wall - "Thou breaker of oaths are condemned to silence and wrestless sleep eternal"

card.subtitle: Wackadoos
card.body: These jerkoffs attacked us out of nowhere and when it looked like we might be able to stop them, surrendered and demanded they be administered to per the Geneva Conventions.

card.subtitle: a hungry, sadistic beast
card.body: After doing us a favor and chewing on a sea vulture, the beast annoying decided to track and attack us.  Well fuck him!  he dead!

card.subtitle: Point of Interest
card.body: Apparently a giant (and I mean giant) bird lives here as per the empty nest we encountered made out of full sized branches or even trees.  Only Rabiesman had the guts to want to challenge the bird, but was overruled.

card.subtitle: Ancient Landmark
card.body: A giant pillar seen from the sea. Below it sits a stele with indecipherable words

card.subtitle: Ancient Site
card.body: Some runes sitting atop a grassy hill overlooking the sea.
card.quote: "Take up your blade and remove 2 crowns in 1 strike from a King atop this mound – Our God Knell, our God Knell"

card.subtitle: Cursed Location
card.body: I guess it's cursed but what the hell does that even mean these days.  we're fuckin cursed, everyone's cursed living in this lovely area.

card.subtitle: Encounter Site
card.body: the slack jaws in Lothing claimed a big monster lives here but they are also afraid to go 5 miles out to sea, so who knows.

card.subtitle: City
card.body: Another hallucination from captain Lonc before he walked naked out into the woods to be eaten by a Wyvern.

card.subtitle: Settlement
card.body: Captain Lonc claimed it was a small site to the east.  Fuck that guy.

card.subtitle: City
card.body: This fuckin place.  The Warden Queen runs things from a fort at the top of the city, banded by ringe walls.  Guards with clipped ears patrol things, but you can get just about anything you want.  Even hirelings!

npcs.name: Warden Queen
npcs.desc: has underlings stationed at forts to the south.

card.subtitle: Region
card.body: Sheep Island.  The idiots in Lothing have an endless food source 5 miles from them and they don't even know it.

card.subtitle: Battlement
card.body: It's a fort on a shitty map we probably got scammed on.

card.subtitle: Battlement
card.body: It's a fort on a shitty map we probably got scammed on.

card.subtitle: military outpost
card.body: It's a fort on a map. I think this one is run by a count.

card.subtitle: map location
card.body: Unexplored village. We ain't been here yet, quit asking.

card.subtitle: map location
card.body: Unexplored village. We ain't been here yet, quit asking.

card.subtitle: Region
card.body: A city on a map we bought in Eaverness. Probably bullshit.

card.subtitle: Regional Forest
card.body: The mighty Black Stathe - crowed about endlessly by the good people of Eaverness as "scary" and "dark".  It's just a bunch of trees and scares no true viking.

card.subtitle: the normal kind
card.body: a bunch of nice fellas who are laying low from some concern.  we traded them cuttlefish for a little info on the region.
